name: 颈侧拉伸
description: 右手轻放左耳上方，头缓慢向右侧倾斜，感受左侧拉伸。左右各 15 秒
description_en: Place one hand lightly on the opposite ear, slowly tilt head to that side until you feel the neck stretch. Hold 15 sec each side.

name: 下巴回缩
description: 收下巴向后推（做「双下巴」），保持 3 秒释放，重复 10 次
description_en: Draw chin straight back (double-chin motion), hold 3 sec, release. Repeat 10 times.

name: 耸肩释放
description: 用力耸肩到耳朵，保持 5 秒，突然放松落下，重复 5 次
description_en: Shrug shoulders hard up toward ears, hold 5 sec, then suddenly drop and release. Repeat 5 times.

name: 门框开胸
description: 手肘 90° 撑门框两侧，身体前倾，感受胸肌拉开，保持 20 秒 × 2 组
description_en: Forearms on doorframe at 90°, lean body forward until chest opens. Hold 20 sec × 2 sets.

name: 肩胛骨后收
description: 双臂下垂，想象把两侧肩胛骨向中间「夹铅笔」，保持 5 秒，重复 10 次
description_en: Let arms hang, squeeze shoulder blades together as if pinching a pencil between them. Hold 5 sec, 10 reps.

name: 胸椎旋转
description: 坐直双手交叉抱肩，上半身缓慢左右旋转，骨盆不动，左右各 5 次
description_en: Sit tall, arms crossed over chest. Slowly rotate upper body left and right keeping hips still. 5 reps each side.

name: 站立侧弯拉伸
description: 一手举过头顶，身体向对侧弯曲，感受侧腰拉伸，左右各 5 次
description_en: Raise one arm overhead, bend toward the opposite side until you feel the side-body stretch. 5 reps each side.

name: 坐姿翘腿髋拉伸
description: 一脚脚踝放另一膝盖上，上身前倾，感受臀部深层拉伸，每侧 20 秒
description_en: Rest one ankle on the opposite knee, lean forward gently until you feel a deep hip stretch. Hold 20 sec each side.

name: 站姿髋屈肌拉伸
description: 一脚前跨一小步，重心前移，感受后腿前侧拉伸，每侧 15 秒
description_en: Step one foot slightly forward, shift weight forward to stretch the back leg's hip flexor. Hold 15 sec each side.

name: 手腕屈伸拉伸
description: 一手伸直，另一手轻压手指向下拉伸，正反各做，每手每方向 10 秒
description_en: Extend one arm, use the other hand to gently press fingers down, then back. Hold 10 sec in each direction per hand.

name: 手臂横拉肩伸展
description: 右臂伸直向左侧伸展，左手肘部辅助拉伸，左右各 15 秒
description_en: Extend one arm across the body, use the opposite elbow to press and hold the stretch. 15 sec each side.

name: 坐姿腹式呼吸
description: 双手放腹部，鼻吸 4 秒腹部隆起，口呼 6 秒收腹，重复 8 次
description_en: Hands on belly. Inhale through nose 4 sec (belly rises), exhale through mouth 6 sec (belly falls). Repeat 8 times.

name: 坐姿扭转
description: 坐直，双手合十于胸前，躯干缓慢左右旋转，共 12–16 次
description_en: Sit tall, hands clasped at chest. Slowly rotate torso left and right. 12–16 total reps.

name: 坐姿侧弯
description: 坐直，手臂放身侧，侧身弯腰手指触地板方向，左右各 10–12 次
description_en: Sit tall, reach one hand down toward the floor beside the chair. 10–12 reps each side.

name: 坐姿斜向抬膝
description: 坐直，右膝抬向左肘方向，交替进行，共 12–16 次
description_en: Sit tall, lift right knee toward left elbow and alternate. 12–16 total reps.

name: 坐姿双膝上抬
description: 扶椅侧，身体微后倾，双膝同时抬向胸口，缓慢放下，10–12 次
description_en: Hold chair sides, lean back slightly, lift both knees toward chest slowly and lower. 10–12 reps.

name: 坐姿自行车
description: 微后倾，双脚离地，对侧肘膝交替碰触，模拟骑车动作，12–20 次
description_en: Lean back slightly, feet off floor. Alternate bringing opposite elbow and knee together in a cycling motion. 12–20 reps.

name: 坐姿腿画圈
description: 伸直一腿，在空中画小圆圈，每方向 8–10 次，换腿
description_en: Extend one leg, draw small circles in the air. 8–10 circles per direction, then switch legs.

name: 坐姿前倾卷腹
description: 双手交叉抱胸，缓慢向前弯腰卷腹再回正，10–12 次
description_en: Arms crossed over chest. Slowly curl forward into a crunch, then return upright. 10–12 reps.

name: 坐姿触脚跟
description: 脚着地，身体前倾，右手触右脚跟，左手触左脚跟，交替 12–16 次
description_en: Feet on floor, lean forward slightly. Alternate touching right hand to right heel, left hand to left heel. 12–16 reps.

name: 坐姿背伸展
description: 坐椅边双手轻放脑后，上身从微弯腰缓慢向后挺直到略微过伸，感受下背发力，10–12 次
description_en: Hands lightly behind head. From a slight forward lean, slowly extend spine back to upright and slightly past. 10–12 reps.

name: 扶桌深蹲
description: 双手轻扶桌边，慢蹲慢起，动作控制，10 次
description_en: Lightly hold desk edge for balance, lower slowly into a squat and rise with control. 10 reps.

name: 站姿臀部激活
description: 扶桌站立，一腿微后伸，臀部夹紧 5 秒，每侧 10 次
description_en: Stand at desk, extend one leg slightly back and squeeze the glute for 5 sec. 10 reps each side.

name: 坐姿踮脚勾脚交替
description: 踮脚尖和勾脚尖各保持 5 秒，各 15 次
description_en: Alternate raising up on tiptoes (hold 5 sec) and pulling toes up (hold 5 sec). 15 reps each.

name: 坐姿臀部夹紧
description: 坐着夹紧臀部，保持 10 秒释放，8–10 次
description_en: While seated, squeeze glutes tight and hold 10 sec, then release. Repeat 8–10 times.

name: 坐姿腿部伸展
description: 坐在椅边，一腿伸直抬起保持 3 秒，每腿 10 次
description_en: Sit at chair edge, extend one leg straight and hold 3 sec. 10 reps per leg.

name: 椅子滑行
description: 双脚踩地向前伸直，用脚跟发力把椅子拉回，10 次
description_en: Extend legs with feet on floor, engage hamstrings to drag the chair back with your heels. 10 reps.

name: 坐姿撑椅
description: 双手撑椅子边缘，手臂发力尝试抬起身体（不需要真的抬起），保持 3 秒，10 次
description_en: Grip chair edges, press arms down as if lifting yourself (no need to actually lift). Hold 3 sec, 10 reps.

name: 小腿提踵
description: 坐着双脚踮起脚尖保持 10 秒，重复 8–10 次
description_en: While seated, raise both heels onto tiptoes, hold 10 sec, lower. Repeat 8–10 times.

name: 爬楼梯
description: 出门正常速度上楼，缓慢下楼，3–5 层
description_en: Walk up stairs at a normal pace, descend slowly. 3–5 floors.

name: 坐姿夹膝
description: 将一个物品（书本或水瓶）放双膝之间，用力夹紧保持 5 秒释放，12–15 次
description_en: Place a book or bottle between your knees, squeeze hard for 5 sec, release. 12–15 reps.

name: 坐姿肩上推举
description: 坐直，双手各握一重物（书本/水瓶），从肩部两侧向上推举再放下，12–15 次
description_en: Sit tall with a weight in each hand at shoulder height. Press both overhead, lower back to shoulders. 12–15 reps.

name: 坐姿侧平举
description: 坐直，双手握重物自然下垂，手臂微弯缓慢侧举至与肩平，10–12 次
description_en: Sit tall, hold weights at sides with slight elbow bend. Raise arms out to shoulder height, lower slowly. 10–12 reps.

name: 坐姿弯举
description: 坐着，双手握重物掌心朝上，弯曲手肘将重物抬向肩部，12–15 次
description_en: Hold weights with palms up, curl from hip to shoulder and lower with control. 12–15 reps.

name: 颈后臂屈伸
description: 双手合握一重物举过头顶，弯曲手肘将重物放到脑后再伸直，10–12 次
description_en: Hold one weight with both hands overhead. Bend elbows to lower behind head, then press back up. 10–12 reps.

name: 坐姿前平举
description: 坐直，双手握重物自然下垂，手臂伸直缓慢前举至与肩平，10–12 次
description_en: Sit tall, hold weights at sides with arms straight. Raise both arms forward to shoulder height, lower slowly. 10–12 reps.

name: 俯身后飞鸟
description: 坐椅边上身前倾 45°，双手握重物自然下垂，手臂微弯向两侧展开至与肩平，缓慢放下，10–12 次
description_en: Sit at chair edge, hinge forward 45°. Hold weights hanging down, raise arms out to shoulder height squeezing shoulder blades, lower slowly. 10–12 reps.
